blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 9 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for document lock after final signature.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for document lock after final signature.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement stating that the final signed document should be locked and immutable. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API endpoints or mechanisms that enforce this document locking behavior. The linked use case describes the workflow and mentions the locking of the final signed document, but lacks specific details or evidence to confirm that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
